topic: There are muddy work clothes in my hamper every Monday but I work from home
title: There Are Muddy Work Clothes in My Hamper Every Monday. I Work From Home. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There are filthy work clothes in my hamper every Monday. Caked in mud. I work from home.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of muddy men's coveralls stuffed in a laundry hamper, wet clay caked on the fabric, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. I have not owned coveralls in my life.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small tidy home laundry room at night, a hamper and a washing machine, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wash my own laundry on Sundays.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of folded clean laundry on top of a washing machine, dim daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Monday the hamper held men's coveralls, heavy with wet clay.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of heavy work coveralls covered in wet clay lying in a hamper, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand touching damp muddy coveralls, faint steam rising, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Boot socks. A torn glove. All my size.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of muddy boot socks and a torn work glove on a laundry room floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I emptied the hamper and locked the laundry room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an emptied hamper and a locked laundry room door, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Monday. Coveralls again. Mud still dripping.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of muddy coveralls dripping clay onto a laundry room floor, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each week the clay is darker. Lately it smells like a dug grave.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of dark clay smeared on work clothes in a hamper, very dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I heard the washer running. Inside, the coveralls turned, alone, in red water.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a washing machine drum spinning coveralls in reddish water, dim laundry room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I unplugged the machine and slept with the key on me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an unplugged washing machine cord lying on the floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the coveralls were folded on my bed. Clean. My name stitched on the chest.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of clean folded coveralls on a bed with a name patch stitched on the chest, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
